Easy AI The AI plays passively, allowing you to learn the game at your own pace and without pressure.
Normal AI The AI develops at a steady pace and focuses on defense. It rarely invades new areas, preferring instead to fortify its own territory.
Hard AI The AI plays aggressively, commands multiple heroes (if possible), develops its cities efficiently, and launches frequent attacks.
AI for Multiplayer A simplified AI with more predictable behavior in battles, designed specifically for multiplayer games.
Unfair AI The AI uses all possible and impossible means to seize the victory.

Starting Resources: • 25,000 Gold • 30 Wood and Ore each • 20 Gems, Crystals and Mercury each • 250 Alchemical Dust. AI Starting Resources: • Considerably fewer Very weak neutral squads (50% of Hard difficulty) require a small army to be defeated. Easy AI The AI‑player develops slowly, rarely invades other areas, and mainly focuses on strengthening its own territory.

Starting Resources: • 20 000 Gold • 20 Wood and Ore each • 15 Gems, Crystals and Mercury each • 150 Alchemical Dust. AI Starting Resources: • Slightly fewer Weak neutral squads (75% of Hard difficulty) require a medium-size army to be defeated. Easy AI The AI-player develops slowly, rarely invades other areas, and mainly focuses on strengthening its own territory.

Starting Resources: • 15,000 Gold • 15 Wood and Ore each • 10 Gems, Crystals and Mercury each • 100 Alchemical Dust. AI Starting Resources: • Slightly more Normal neutral squads (100%) require a well-built army to be defeated. Normal AI The AI plays actively, uses several heroes (if possible), and occasionally invades other areas. It also develops its cities at a steady pace.

Starting Resources: • 10 000 Gold • 10 Wood and Ore each • 5 Gems, Crystals and Mercury each • 50 Alchemical Dust. AI Starting Resources: • Considerably more Strong neutral squads (125% of Hard difficulty) require a strong army and good tactics to be defeated. Normal AI The AI plays actively, uses several heroes (if possible), and occasionally invades other areas. It also develops its cities at a steady pace.

Starting Resources: • 5,000 Gold • 5 Wood and Ore each • 2 Gems, Crystals and Mercury each • 25 Alchemical Dust. AI Starting Resources: • A lot more Very strong neutral squads (150% of Hard difficulty) require a strong army and careful planning to be defeated. Hard AI The AI plays aggressively, commands multiple heroes (if possible), develops its cities efficiently, and launches frequent attacks.

Starting Resources: • 2,500 Gold AI Starting Resources: • Enormously more The strongest neutral squads (200% of Hard difficulty) can only be defeated with a perfect army and strategy. Hard AI The AI plays aggressively, commands multiple heroes (if possible), develops its cities efficiently, and launches frequent attacks.

You can control multiple heroes. If one of them dies, the game continues.
A quick game mode in which you draft a hero, their equipment, and an army, then directly proceed to duel with an opponent.
Similar to Classic Mode, but each player controls only one hero. Faster-paced and more focused.
Single Hero Mode. You cannot hire additional heroes during the game. If your hero dies, you lose.
Classic Mode. You can control multiple heroes. If one of them dies, the game continues.

When you play multiplayer, we create an online profile using your account so we can handle matchmaking and rankings. Other players may see your display name, profile picture and basic stats. You can reset or delete your multiplayer profile anytime in the game’s settings.

A very small percentage of individuals may experience epileptic seizures when exposed to certain light patterns or flashing lights. Exposure to certain patterns or backgrounds on a computer screen, or while playing video games, may induce an epileptic seizure in these individuals. Certain conditions may induce previously undetected epileptic symptoms even in persons who have no history of prior seizures or epilepsy. If you, or anyone in your family, have an epileptic condition, consult your physician prior to playing. If you experience any of the following symptoms while playing a video or computer game — dizziness, altered vision, eye or muscle twitches, loss of awareness, disorientation, any involuntary movement, or convulsions — IMMEDIATELY discontinue use and consult your physician before resuming play. Tips for use of video games to reduce epileptic seizures and other health concerns: • Consult your doctor before playing if you have serious medical conditions, if you are pregnant or elderly, or if you have an implanted medical device • Avoid playing when you are sick, tired, and/or under the influence of medicine or drugs • Keep your eyes as far away as possible from the screen • Do not use earphones at a high volume as hearing loss may occur • Play in a comfortable posture to avoid numbness, stiffness or other discomfort • Take regular breaks during play sessions. The length and frequency of necessary breaks may vary from one person to another • Stop playing if you are experiencing any discomfort
Are you sure you want to delete this saves folder?
This is the beta version of the map editor. You may encounter errors.
The Map Editor is still in development and will be significantly improved. In this version, you may encounter unexpected errors and unstable behavior.

Thank you for joining us! As the game is in Game Preview, you can expect some platform features not to work correctly, and you may encounter some bugs and crashes as well. Throughout our time in Game Preview, we’ll be adding content and features, fixing bugs, balancing, and generally working to make the game better through all the bug reports and feedback from the community. Please feel free to reach out to us on Discord. Thank you for your support!

Thank you for joining us! As the game is in Early Access, you can expect some platform features not to work correctly, and you may encounter some bugs and crashes as well. Throughout our time in Early Access, we’ll be adding content and features, fixing bugs, balancing, and generally working to make the game better through all the bug reports and feedback from the community. Please feel free to reach out to us on Discord or using the bug report button below. Thank you for your support!

Hello and welcome to Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era Early Access! We’re delighted to have you here as you dive into the continent of Jadame and discover its wonders. Throughout Early Access, we’ll be adding new content and continuing to work on bug fixes, polish, and balance — your feedback will help us shape the best possible experience.

During Early Access, you’ll be able to play:
• Six unique factions: Temple, Dungeon, Schism, Grove, Necropolis, and Hive
• An in‑game tutorial
• The first act of our long, non‑linear campaign. More acts will be added with the full release of the game.
• Premade scenarios with self‑contained stories, with even more coming during Early Access
• Classic, Single Hero, and Arena modes, available in both single‑player and multiplayer
• Matchmaking, ranked play, and leaderboards for all three modes
• A wide variety of Random Map Generator templates for unlimited replayability
• Hotseat mode, allowing you to play against friends and family one after another on a single PC
• A series of puzzle‑style challenges
• A map editor (beta) to create your own adventures

Master a wide range of skills and talents, equip powerful artifacts, visit a multitude of locations, command different fantasy creatures, shape the future of your kingdom with strategic faction laws, and upgrade your army for the challenges ahead!

During Game Preview, you’ll be able to play:
• Six unique factions: Temple, Dungeon, Schism, Grove, Necropolis, and Hive
• An in‑game tutorial
• The first act of our long, non‑linear campaign. More acts will be added with the full release of the game.
• Premade scenarios with self‑contained stories, with even more coming during Early Access
• Classic, Single Hero, and Arena modes, available in both single‑player and multiplayer
• Matchmaking, ranked play, and leaderboards for all three modes
• A wide variety of Random Map Generator templates for unlimited replayability
• Hotseat mode, allowing you to play against friends and family one after another on a single PC
• A series of puzzle‑style challenges
• A map editor (beta) to create your own adventures

Master a wide range of skills and talents, equip powerful artifacts, visit a multitude of locations, command different fantasy creatures, shape the future of your kingdom with strategic faction laws, and upgrade your army for the challenges ahead!
